violations.text: The chest freezer lid located in the storefront area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
The chest freezers were observed with and accumulation of ice. Establishment is to run a defrost on freezers. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Establishment is to make the toilet room door self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024

Produce packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023
The floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2023
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
Hand sinks are lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands is required at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Chicken, pork belly, and bones packaged in the establishment observed in freezers, with PIC unable to provide source information. PIC stated items belong to her, and she will take them home. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Numerous produce items, and meats packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
Food observed stored on boards not 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

Single service items (trays for packaging produce) are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean. Single service items observed stored on boards not at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

The non-food contact surfaces the market shelves and refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
The floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in areas of the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in areas of the market. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
